name: Mile High Raspberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, salt, and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolk and beat well. Stir in flour and almonds to make a firm dough. Press into a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes or until golden. Thaw raspberries.
5. In a large bowl, combine raspberries, sugar, egg whites, lemon juice, and salt. Beat for 15 minutes or until stiff.
6. Fold in whipped cream and almond extract. Mound into the baked pastry shell.
7. Freeze until firm.
